positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a crescent moon embracing a grouping of stylized shooting stars and constellations. The scene should evoke a sense of wonder and cosmic journey. Use thick, clean, continuous line work combined with solid areas of deep indigo and celestial turquoise. The style should be modern, slightly retro-futuristic, resembling celestial maps or tattoo flash art, with a strong, crisp silhouette. Composition must be centered and balanced, suitable for a large, impactful print on fabric. The background should be mostly negative space with subtle gradient texture, emphasizing the central artwork. High contrast, deep jewel tones, vector art quality, ultra-detailed, clean lines, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, grainy, low resolution, dirty, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, poor quality, cartoonish, gradient bleed
